widget_id: Exact Legal Name of Entity on the records of the Secretary of State
label_verbatim: (Exact Legal Name of Entity on the records of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Foreign entity's real name in its home jurisdiction (the name that is unavailable in Maine). Same key as MLLC-12, CORP_FICT-4 — foreign-qualification convention per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The entity must transact business under the fictitious name of
rationale: The fictitious name to be used in Maine. Same key as MLLC-12 / CORP_FICT-4.

label_verbatim: SECOND: Jurisdiction of incorporation/organization ___ and the date on which
rationale: Field NAME is 'and the date on which' (auto-generated from the label text immediately following the blank), but the widget at rect [272.8, 379.1, 454.3, 402.2] captures the Jurisdiction value BEFORE that text. Holds the entity's home state/country. Same field-id quirk as CORP_FICT-4 (the PDFs are md5-identical).

label_verbatim: the entity was authorized to transact business in Maine
rationale: Date the foreign entity was authorized to transact business in Maine. Widget at rect [323.6, 352.2, 568.9, 378.1] sits one line below the jurisdiction blank, consistent with the form's two-line SECOND recital.
Signer printed name. Shape A (split name + title) per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md — matches CORP_FICT-4 and CORP_CLKRA-3.
Signer title. For a foreign nonprofit corporation invoking this form, allowed titles per §1304 are President, Vice-President, Secretary, Treasurer, or other duly authorized officer.
